requirement_topic.en: Top Runner Programme — Heat-pump HVAC SCOP Targets
requirement_topic.zh: 领跑者制度——热泵HVAC SCOP目标
requirement_topic.zht: 領跑者制度——熱泵HVAC SCOP目標

summary.en: South Korea uses an energy-efficiency Top Runner programme administered through energy-policy bodies including MOTIE and KEMCO. Covered heat-pump and air-conditioning products may need to meet or document category-specific target performance such as SCOP, with Korean product classification, test conditions, reporting, and labelling controls applied separately from the ordinary KEMCO grade label.
summary.zh: 韩国通过MOTIE和KEMCO等能源政策机构实施能效领跑者制度。范围内热泵和空调产品可能需要满足或记录按品类设定的SCOP等目标性能，并按韩国产品分类、测试条件、报告和标签管制执行，该要求与普通KEMCO等级标签分别适用。
summary.zht: 韓國通過MOTIE和KEMCO等能源政策機構實施能效領跑者制度。範圍內熱泵和空調產品可能需要滿足或記錄按品類設定的SCOP等目標性能，並按韓國產品分類、測試條件、報告和標籤管制執行，該要求與普通KEMCO等級標籤分別適用。

standards_or_laws: Applicable SCOP target criteria for heat-pump HVAC products

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 25454 and GB/T 7725 for COP, SCOP, and heat-pump performance evidence, CCC mandatory certification for applicable heat pumps up to 40 kW, and GB 9237 as a refrigerant safety baseline. Chinese efficiency target or label evidence is not a substitute for South Korea Top Runner classification and target documentation.
summary.zh: 中国通常以GB 25454和GB/T 7725作为COP、SCOP和热泵性能证据，对适用的40 kW及以下热泵实施CCC强制认证，并以GB 9237作为制冷剂安全基线。中国能效目标或标签证据不能替代韩国领跑者分类和目标文件。
summary.zht: 中國通常以GB 25454和GB/T 7725作為COP、SCOP和熱泵性能證據，對適用的40 kW及以下熱泵實施CCC強制認證，並以GB 9237作為制冷劑安全基線。中國能效目標或標籤證據不能替代韓國領跑者分類和目標文件。

standards_or_laws: CCC mandatory certification for applicable heat pumps up to 40 kW

gap.en: Exporters need a South Korea-specific Top Runner applicability check before making high-efficiency or SCOP claims. The main gap is classification and calculation: China GB/T 7725 or GB 25454 data may not match Korean categories, climate assumptions, seasonal calculation boundaries, or 60 Hz test conditions.
gap.zh: 出口商在作出高能效或SCOP声明前，需要进行韩国专用领跑者适用性检查。主要差距在分类和计算：中国GB/T 7725或GB 25454数据可能不匹配韩国类别、气候假设、季节计算边界或60 Hz测试条件。
gap.zht: 出口商在作出高能效或SCOP聲明前，需要進行韓國專用領跑者適用性檢查。主要差距在分類和計算：中國GB/T 7725或GB 25454數據可能不匹配韓國類別、氣候假設、季節計算邊界或60 Hz測試條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory or target-managed for covered product classes under South Korea Top Runner and energy efficiency policy
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for applicable Chinese efficiency categories; target system is not equivalent to South Korea Top Runner

source.publisher: Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy (MOTIE), Republic of Korea

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — South Korea Top Runner SCOP or target-performance treatment must be checked separately from China efficiency reports and KEMCO grade labelling.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——韩国领跑者SCOP或目标性能处理必须与中国能效报告和KEMCO等级标签分开核验。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——韓國領跑者SCOP或目標性能處理必須與中國能效報告和KEMCO等級標籤分開核驗。
